name: insitu-sales
description: Connect Codex to the inSitu Sales MCP server for wholesale distribution workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Use inSitu Sales tools for wholesale operations.
interface.longDescription: Founded in 2017, inSitu Sales began with a goal of simplifying sales for small and medium wholesale distributors. What started as an app for orders, routes, and invoice collection has grown into a connected platform for field sales, B2B eCommerce, inventory picking, warehouse management, and delivery dispatch. This plugin connects Codex to the inSitu Sales MCP server so teams can work with sales-system operations from Codex.
defaultPrompt: Help me inspect inSitu Sales data.
